events.event: Taught himself Rust from 'The Rust Book' and joined Shuttle's Heroes volunteer program after career burnout in food wholesale
Published 'Next.js and Rust' — 100k+ hits and HackerNews front page, leading to a paid Shuttle contract
Published 'Can Rust Beat JavaScript in 2023?' — went viral, reviewed by ThePrimeagen
Promoted to full-time DevRel Engineer at Shuttle.rs at EuroRust conference after 10x traffic growth
Joined 0xPlaygrounds as DevRel Engineer for the Rig AI agent SDK
Created rig-experimental: Companion crate for `rig`, the Rust-based agentic AI framework.
Created bolter: An experimental agent runtime using sandboxed tool execution.
Created braindump: An ergonomic, opinionated memory interface for AI agents
Created rig-rlm: An example of creating a Recursive Language Model with Rust
